Decks

« back | next »

Interactive (Flash/SWF, via Ruffle)

A Flash toy from the Sunbather years, built when Flash was still the way to make anything move on the web. Rebuilt to play via Ruffle, an emulator that runs original Flash files without the long-dead Flash Player plugin.
